task_description: Make the CareVista app fully mobile-responsive with comprehensive CSS media queries, 44px tap targets, responsive inline grids via CSS attribute selectors, mobile-friendly Login page, and responsive dashboard layouts

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation and Vite build succeed. No test suite exists in this project. Global grid override now excludes .no-mobile-collapse elements. Calendar grids, data tables, and auto-fill activity grids retain their columns on mobile.
